name: Actalent, Inc.
lede: Actalent runs four capability centers across four Indian cities. Bengaluru, Chennai, Hyderabad and Pune, covering engineering & design, built over 21 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Actalent office in India. We map four, across four cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Actalent, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Actalent runs 4 verified GCC centers across 4 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Chennai, Hyderabad, Pune), covering engineering & design. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership

about.description: Actalent's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Chennai, Hyderabad and Pune, spanning engineering & design. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all eight decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Actalent operate in India?
faq.a: Actalent operates 4 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Actalent have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Actalent's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru, Chennai, Hyderabad and Pune.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Actalent run in India?
faq.a: Actalent runs engineering & design centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Actalent's India GCCs?
faq.a: Actalent's India centers employ in the 501 to 1,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Actalent's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 8 leaders at Actalent's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
